description: A production-ready CRM sales dashboard built with MVUX and Uno.Extensions Navigation, with a responsive desktop/mobile layout. Includes a Dashboard (KPI cards for leads, deals, revenue and conversion rate, a pipeline summary by stage, and a recent-activity feed), a Pipeline board whose deal cards open a full-screen deal detail, a Leads page with LiveCharts analytics, and a Contacts page with a live Mapsui map and reactive filters. Adaptive shell (sidebar on desktop, bottom navigation on mobile) with a clean, professional light/dark UI.

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready CRM sales dashboard app with:
- mock state
- a responsive layout that adapts between desktop (sidebar navigation) and mobile (bottom navigation)
- a clean, professional UI

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue This Month, Conversion Rate) with trend indicators
- a Pipeline Summary showing each stage (New Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won) with progress bars
- a Recent Activity feed (deals closed, leads assigned, proposals sent, meetings scheduled)
- a search box and notifications

Navigation:
- Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads and Contacts pages
- adaptive shell: sidebar on desktop, bottom nav bar on mobile

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (leads, deals, activity)
Here's your **Uno CRM** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a deal details page with navigation
Add a chart to the dashboard

messages.content:
Generate a production-ready CRM sales dashboard app with:
- mock state
- a responsive layout that adapts between desktop (sidebar navigation) and mobile (bottom navigation)
- a clean, professional UI

Dashboard:
- KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue This Month, Conversion Rate) with trend indicators
- a Pipeline Summary showing each stage (New Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won) with progress bars
- a Recent Activity feed (deals closed, leads assigned, proposals sent, meetings scheduled)
- a search box and notifications

Navigation:
- Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads and Contacts pages
- adaptive shell: sidebar on desktop, bottom nav bar on mobile

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (leads, deals, activity)

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at UnoCRM/UnoCRM.csproj.

**Key files:**
- UnoCRM/App.xaml (thin manifest merging ThemeColors.xaml + Styles.xaml)
- UnoCRM/App.xaml.cs (Uno.Extensions Hosting + MVUX ReactiveViewModelMappings + RegisterRoutes)
- UnoCRM/ThemeColors.xaml, UnoCRM/Styles.xaml
- UnoCRM/Presentation/Shell.xaml(.cs), ShellModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/MainPage.xaml(.cs), MainModel.cs (responsive NavigationView + TabBar shell)
- UnoCRM/Presentation/DashboardPage.xaml(.cs), DashboardModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/PipelinePage.xaml(.cs), PipelineModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/LeadsPage.xaml(.cs), LeadsModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/ContactsPage.xaml(.cs), ContactsModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/DealDetailPage.xaml(.cs), DealDetailModel.cs
- UnoCRM/Presentation/Data/Entities.cs, CrmData.cs (immutable records + deterministic seed)
- UnoCRM/Presentation/MockData/ContactsPageMockData.cs (Hot Design)
- UnoCRM/Controls/PipelineCard.xaml, AppLogo.xaml
- UnoCRM/Converters/*.cs

**Structure:**
- The app uses **MVUX** (partial-record Models, IState/IFeed/IListFeed, no INotifyPropertyChanged/RelayCommand) and **Uno.Extensions Navigation**. Shell hosts the ExtendedSplashScreen; MainPage is the navigation shell (NavigationView pane on desktop, bottom TabBar on mobile, driven by {utu:Responsive}) into which Dashboard/Pipeline/Leads/Contacts are injected.
- Dashboard: KPI cards (Total Leads, Active Deals, Revenue, Conversion Rate), a Pipeline Summary with per-stage bars, and a Recent Activity feed.
- Pipeline: a stage board of deal cards; each card is a clickable button that opens a full-screen DealDetail page (DataViewMap with the tapped Deal as nav data).
- Leads: LiveCharts analytics (lead-trend line, stage-distribution donut using a dedicated chart palette, source bar).
- Contacts: a live Mapsui map plus a reactive contact list filtered by search/region/segment (IState + Feed.Combine); the desktop and mobile filter controls share one state.
- One deterministic in-memory dataset (Presentation/Data/CrmData.cs) feeds every page. Icons are PathIcon/Path vector geometry (Fluent), text uses the framework Roboto, and styling lives in ThemeColors.xaml (light/dark palette) + Styles.xaml.

The app builds and runs on desktop, WebAssembly, iOS and Android. The user may ask me to modify it.
